visual_description: A man in glasses and a suit is shown in close-up against a dark background. Two men sit side by side in a dimly lit room, one in a white shirt and the other in a denim jacket, both facing forward. The man in the white shirt turns his head slightly to his right, while the man in the denim jacket keeps his gaze straight ahead.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a clear, neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in a quiet environment with no background noise.
